bug.description: stack buffer overflow from unbounded copy into fixed-size local array

prompt:
There is a stack buffer overflow from unbounded copy into fixed-size local array downstream of function get_single_ue_id in the common/utils/telnetsrv subsystem.
The function is located at common/utils/telnetsrv/telnetsrv_rrc.c:55.
Please investigate and fix this issue.
